'''kazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dreamily|dreamily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dreamily|dreamily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kazhate|kazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kazhatesher|kazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazhatesherĂ«m|kazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kazhatero|kazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kazhateshĂ«|kazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazhateshĂ«m|kazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikazhatero|gokikazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikazhateshĂ«|gokikazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazhateshĂ«m|gokikazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokazhankerom|gokazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokazhankeshĂ«|gokazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazhankeshĂ«m|gokazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokazhankeya|gokazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kazhaterom|kazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazhatemu|kazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kazhateya|kazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikazhaterom|gokikazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazhatemu|gokikazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikazhateya|gokikazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kazhazhate|kazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kazhazhatesher|kazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazhazhatesherĂ«m|kazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kazhazhatero|kazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kazhazhateshĂ«|kazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazhazhateshĂ«m|kazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikazhazhatero|gokikazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikazhazhateshĂ«|gokikazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazhazhateshĂ«m|gokikazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokazhazhankerom|gokazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokazhazhankeshĂ«|gokazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazhazhankeshĂ«m|gokazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokazhazhankeya|gokazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kazhazhaterom|kazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazhazhatemu|kazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kazhazhateya|kazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikazhazhaterom|gokikazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazhazhatemu|gokikazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikazhazhateya|gokikazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠzhĂŠte|kĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠzhĂŠtesher|kĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠzhĂŠtero|kĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokikĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠzhĂŠterom|kĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠzhĂŠtemu|kĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠzhĂŠteya|kĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokikĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokikĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafzhafte|kafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafzhaftesher|kafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafzhaftesherĂ«m|kafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafzhaftero|kafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafzhafteshĂ«|kafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafzhafteshĂ«m|kafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafzhaftero|gokikafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafzhafteshĂ«|gokikafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafzhafteshĂ«m|gokikafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafzhafnkerom|gokafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafzhafnkeshĂ«|gokafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gokafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafzhafnkeya|gokafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafzhafterom|kafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafzhaftemu|kafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafzhafteya|kafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafzhafterom|gokikafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafzhaftemu|gokikafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafzhafteya|gokikafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
